title: New online AI in Education Graduate Certificate equips educators for today’s learning spaces
summary_en: As artificial Intelligence transforms teaching and learning, Purdue University’s College of Education has unveiled its new AI in Education Graduate Certificate.
title_cn: 全新在线教育人工智能研究生证书助力教育工作者适配当前学习空间

title: Distinguished professor Phillip VanFossen named Suzi and Dale Gallagher Dean of Education
summary_en: Phillip J. VanFossen arrived at Purdue University as an assistant professor of education nearly three decades ago. Now, capping a long and distinguished faculty career and coupled with recent interim duties leading the College of Education, he is confirmed as…
title_cn: 杰出教授菲利普·范福森获任苏齐与戴尔·加拉格尔教育学院院长

title: New 2026 cohort of Holmes Scholars named
summary_en: The American Association of Colleges for Teacher Education (AACTE) Holmes Program named four College of Education PhD students as 2026 Holmes Scholars. The program supports students who self-identify as racially and ethnically diverse and are pursuing graduate degrees in education at AACTE member…
title_cn: 2026届新任霍尔姆斯学者名单公布
